updates.tweet_text:
We remain in ultra low vol in #ES_F. As posted, the range is 7620 to  7574-77. Monday eve - per newsletter - we held 7575 & ran. Yesterday's target was 7620, we've flagged below all night

Plan: Ride your runner. 7632, 7643, 7652 when we break. 7604 (watch traps), 7587=supports https://t.co/H2xGKqCrqs
updates.notes: 7652 named as a breakout target ('7652 when we break') and not in morning plan. 7632, 7643, 7604, 7587 are all existing morning-plan levels.

updates.tweet_text: @OnTheHooch The 7604 level held nicely! Hopefully can get another spike down at some point, this peak slow summer trading now otherwise
updates.notes: 7604 is already in the morning plan; tweet is conversational observation of price action holding that level, not naming a new actionable level.

updates.tweet_text:
The range continues to respect nicely as we setup multi-day trend. 7574-77 to 7620= the range in #ES_F.  We held 7575 on Monday, ran to 7620 target. 7604 was 1st support down to today, here now.

7587 (watch traps), 7574-77 below. 7632, 7643+ when we breakout the range https://t.co/2uFG4giEA1
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7574-77, 7587, 7604, 7620, 7632, 7643) are already in the morning plan; tweet is a reaffirmation/observation, no new levels introduced.

updates.tweet_text: @JohnSantil65902 @Alberkas Its very typical summer trading. Usually one bout of volatility per day then lots of grind
updates.notes: Pure commentary on summer trading patterns, no price levels named or actionable triggers mentioned.

updates.tweet_text: @thekhomish For sure - typically the trend will be in proportion to the range size roughly. Likely see 3-4 days of trend at least from this range when we break out
updates.notes: Reply comment about trend duration/proportion after range breakout; no price named, purely conversational/educational commentary.

updates.tweet_text:
We are getting today's small injection of volatility finally in #ES_F and the range continues to respect perfectly. 7620 resistance, 7574-77 support. We held 74-77 Monday, ran to 7620, now back to 7574-77

Watch reclaims of 7587 now to see 7604+. 7565, 7558 are below this shelf https://t.co/Jo8naXP2pv
updates.notes: All prices (7620, 7577, 7587, 7604, 7565, 7558) are morning-plan levels; tweet is range observation and reaffirmation, no new actionable levels named.

updates.tweet_text: @AStendorr No change from newsletter, I don't include the high quality ones here for free
updates.notes: Reply tweet with no price levels named; purely a comment about newsletter content. No actionable levels introduced.

updates.tweet_text: @HagglundKirk Been a major ATM machine! Would be nice to see it break down though eventually as thats the only real trigger for an elevated window of volatility to get some more trades packed in before we resume up for the summer
updates.notes: Pure directional commentary/reply; no price named, no actionable level, no naming language. Just opinion on volatility outlook.

updates.tweet_text:

7604, 7620 above, then breakout. Sell<74 https://t.co/ijsRmL9201

updates.tweet_text: @StephenJ223624 I got in on the newsletter entry (77 shelf FBD). I don't include the best entries here on Twitter since newsletter readers pay for me. In a Mode 2 range I typically only engage range support

updates.tweet_text:
We got our injection of volatility and now chop in #ES_F. Levels respecting perfectly. 7574-77 was support of a range with 7620 resistance. We sold to 7574 *exact* - longs triggered - and up we went. 7604, 7620 if ES wants more, then multi-day break.

Next dip is under 7574 https://t.co/hagTYBMj2p
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7574-77, 7604, 7620) are observations of price action or reaffirmations of morning-plan levels; 7574 dip reference is a hindsight/observation note, not a new actionable level.

updates.tweet_text:
As posted, we got our morning spike in volatility, now chop in #ES_F. Levels respecting perfectly. The range is 7574-77 to 7620. At 9:45AM, we held 7574 *exact* and rallied 23 points. Now back again, weaker this time.

7593, 7604, 7620 still above. 7565, 7558 if we can break down https://t.co/GAbcU6l4LS

updates.tweet_text: @tradivate They are in trouble no matter what happens in this context, just a question of how much dip they get first
updates.notes: Pure conversational commentary replying to a user; no price named, no actionable level, no naming language whatsoever.

updates.tweet_text: @NYJets2017 @tradivate We are in a bull market, we will continue up for several years still. It won't be in a straight line obviously, there will be dips and corrections as in all bull markets and as there have been in this bull market
updates.notes: Pure market commentary/opinion about bull market direction. No prices named, no actionable levels, no naming language whatsoever.

updates.tweet_text: @NYJets2017 @tradivate I just track the technicals and broad cycles. Right now we are quite obviously early in this particular cycle and we just broke out of a multi-month flag in April. There will be 3-4 repetitions of that still like all bull markets.
updates.notes: Pure market commentary about bull cycle structure and flag breakout. No actionable price levels named anywhere in the tweet.

updates.tweet_text:
Back to chop in #ES_F and this market is all about two levels: 7574-77 range support & 7620 range resistance. At 9:45AM we held 7574 exact and rallied 23 points. Now, were back again after trapping it. 7577 reclaim with force takes back to 7587, 7604+

7565, 7558 remain supports https://t.co/RmAbbGLGLB
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7574-77, 7620, 7587, 7604, 7565, 7558) are either morning-plan levels or observations of price action; no new actionable levels introduced.
